title: issue template: run `podman info --debug`
body:
Ask users to run podman-info with `--debug` to the exact git commit,
compiler and go version.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

Tests are failing, can't imagine it's related?  @mheon is this a known issue atm?

```
[Fail] Podman pod create [It] podman pod container share Namespaces 
/var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/test/e2e/pod_pod_namespaces.go:41
```
I restarted it manually. Thanks a lot for checking, @TomSweeneyRedHat :pray:
I've seen a lot of flakes on that test. Not 100% sure what's going on with it.
Actually, might not be that test specifically, but another pod test...
